ddls:
CREATE TABLE "variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variant */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the variant */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the variant is located */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the variant on the chromosome */,
  "reference_allele" TEXT /* Reference allele of the variant */,
  "alternative_allele" TEXT /* Alternative allele of the variant */,
  "variant_type" TEXT /* Type of the variant (e.g., SNV, Indel) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the variant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the variant was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the variant annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "gene_description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  "gene_biotype" TEXT /* Biotype of the gene (e.g., protein_coding, lncRNA) */,
  "gene_location" TEXT /* Location of the gene on the genome */,
  "entrez_id" TEXT /* Entrez ID of the gene */,
  "ensembl_id" TEXT /* Ensembl ID of the gene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transcripts" (
  "transcript_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transcript */,
  "transcript_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the transcript */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene the transcript belongs to */,
  "transcript_biotype" TEXT /* Biotype of the transcript (e.g., protein_coding, processed_transcript) */,
  "transcript_location" TEXT /* Location of the transcript on the genome */,
  "protein_id" TEXT /* Protein ID associated with the transcript */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transcript_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcripts_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exons" (
  "exon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exon */,
  "exon_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the exon */,
  "transcript_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transcript the exon belongs to */,
  "exon_start" INTEGER /* Start position of the exon on the genome */,
  "exon_end" INTEGER /* End position of the exon on the genome */,
  "exon_number" INTEGER /* Number of the exon within the transcript */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exons_transcript_id FOREIGN KEY ("transcript_id") REFERENCES transcripts ("transcript_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "impact_severities" (
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each severity level */,
  "severity_name" TEXT /* Name of the severity level (e.g., HIGH, MED, LOW) */,
  "severity_description" TEXT /* Description of the severity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("severity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "polyphen_predictions" (
  "polyphen_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PolyPhen prediction */,
  "polyphen_name" TEXT /* Name of the prediction (e.g., None, Benign, Possibly Damaging) */,
  "polyphen_description" TEXT /* Description of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("polyphen_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sift_predictions" (
  "sift_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SIFT prediction */,
  "sift_name" TEXT /* Name of the prediction (e.g., None, Tolerated, Deleterious) */,
  "sift_description" TEXT /* Description of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sift_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, clinician, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant */,
  "anno_id" INTEGER /* ID of the annotation */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Number of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_versions_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "perm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant */,
  "perm_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("perm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_dataset_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variant */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_dataset_members_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variants ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_dataset_members_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES variant_datasets ("dataset_id")
)
